_meta.description: Sprite manifest for all skill icon assets. Use this file to quickly find skill icons by type and color variant.
_meta.format: Individual 32x32 PNG icons in icons/ folder. Animation sequences in autocast/, cooldown/, highlight_A/B/C/. HUD frames in hud_A/B/.

icons.description: Upward arrow with glowing energy effect for attack buff
Eye with dark shadow or blindfold for blind debuff
Linked chain segments with magical glow for bind/chain spell
Three fiery red slashes with sparks for claw attack
Horizontal sword slash with energy trail for cleave attack
Healing cross or medical symbol for cure/heal spell
Dark shadow or void effect for darkness spell
Speed lines or dash trail for dash ability
Skull or death symbol for instant-kill or death spell
Shield with upward arrow for defense buff
Glowing power-up symbol for empower buff
Eye or telescope symbol for vision/reveal ability
Explosive fire burst for AoE fire spell
Fiery comet with orange-red trail for fireball spell
Coin or treasure symbol for gold/greed ability
Shield or defensive barrier for guard/block ability
Radiant holy light beam for holy/divine spell
Explosive ice crystal burst for AoE ice spell
Sharp ice spike or icicle for ice projectile spell
Purple lightning bolt with yellow sparks for lightning spell
Enchanted dagger with magical aura for magic melee
Toxic cloud or poison vial for poison spell
Poison-coated dagger for poisoned melee attack
Glowing gauntlet or fist for power strike ability
Regeneration symbol or healing effect for regen buff
Sacrificial symbol or blood effect for sacrifice spell
Storm cloud with lightning for storm/weather spell
Three thrown knives for multi-hit ranged attack
Vampire fangs or blood symbol for lifesteal ability
Explosive water burst for AoE water spell

animations.description: Animated energy bolt loop overlay for auto-cast indicator
Animated cooldown timer dark overlay sweeping clockwise
Yellow/cream square outline pulsing highlight animation
Light blue/cyan square outline pulsing highlight animation
Light grey horizontal line sweep highlight animation

hud.description: Dark blue-grey recessed square slot frame for skill bar
Golden-orange ornate frame with dark interior for skill bar

icons.description: Snow avalanche or rockfall for earth/ice AoE spell
Bow with arrow ready to fire for ranged attack
Electrical capacitor for energy storage/tech ability
Magic cauldron with steam for potion/brewing ability
Claw marks or slash attack for beast/melee ability
Dark curse symbol or hex for debuff/curse spell
Vines or roots entangling for crowd control spell
Fairy or magical creature for summon/nature spell
Fiery comet projectile for fireball spell variant
Ice crystal or freeze effect for freeze/stun spell
Mechanical gear or cog for tech/crafting ability
Green energy burst with yellow sparks for heal spell
Ignition or flame burst for DoT fire spell
Keyhole or lock symbol for unlock/rogue ability
Thrown kunai for ninja ranged attack
Eyes with lightning effect for intimidate/shock ability
Hand casting lightning for direct lightning spell
Glowing magic crystal for mana/crystal ability
Magical protective barrier for magic defense buff
Staff with glowing blue crystal head for mage weapon
Enchanted sword with magical aura for magic melee
Magic power-up symbol for magic stat buff
Ancient runic symbols for rune/enchant ability
Sci-fi missile or rocket for tech ranged attack
Thrown shuriken for ninja multi-hit attack
Slashing attack effect for quick melee slice
Speed boost symbol for haste/movement buff
Strength or power symbol for strength stat buff
Burning torch or flame for illumination/fire ability
Tornado or whirlwind for wind/AoE spell
